title: Decadent Flaky Egyptian Gobo Burdock Flatbread
description: A rich and indulgent Egyptian flatbread filled with the earthy flavors of gobo and burdock, perfect for satisfying midnight cravings. This vegan-friendly dish is made with coconut cream and features a crispy, flaky crust.
instructions: In a large mixing bowl, combine the flour, sugar, yeast, and salt.
Gradually add the warm water to the dry ingredients and mix until a shaggy dough forms.
Knead the dough on a floured surface for 10 minutes until smooth and elastic.
Let the dough rise in a warm place for 1 hour, or until doubled in size.
Preheat the oven to 400 degrees Fahrenheit.
Roll out the dough to a thickness of 1/4 inch.
In a separate bowl, mix together the grated gobo and burdock roots, melted vegan butter, and coconut cream.
Spread the gobo and burdock mixture evenly over the center of the dough, leaving a 1 inch border around the edges.
Fold the edges of the dough over the filling to form a crust, and brush with a little water to seal.
Place the flatbread on a baking sheet lined with parchment paper and bake for 25 minutes, or until golden brown.
